## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related Issues

Closes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Template update

## Project-Specific Checklist

- [ ] Follows chat-first workflow conventions
- [ ] Uses correct lesson paths (`lessons/lesson-XX-id/.lesson/artifacts/...`)
- [ ] Respects language policy (metadata/user override)
- [ ] Respects section-count rule (do not force template counts)
- [ ] Keeps naming/status consistent between `lessons/README.md` and `.lesson-config.json` (if applicable)

## Validation

- [ ] Ran `bash -n scripts/*.sh` (if scripts changed)
- [ ] Ran `jq . .lesson/templates/.lesson-config.json >/dev/null` (if config/template changed)
- [ ] Verified relevant workflow commands locally

## Notes for Reviewers

Anything reviewers should focus on.
